oscillator_single_packet_seq
uvm_sequence #(oscillator_packet)
oscillator_single_packet_seq

Represents a single oscillator packet. Randomizes a single packet with the sequence enable state, frequency, and disabled state.

Variables
pkt_enabled
rand bit pkt_enabled

If 1, the clock is enabled with the given frequency. Else, the clock is disabled with the packet disabled state.

pkt_frequency
rand int pkt_frequency

Determines the frequency of an active clock. Note: this is an integer.

pkt_disabled_state
rand bit pkt_disabled_state

Determines the disabled state of an inactive clock
